code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取公司2426的地理坐标
query_company = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id = 2426
""")
company_df = pd.read_sql(query_company, engine)
print(f"公司记录数: {len(company_df)}")
if len(company_df) > 0:
    print(f"公司坐标: {company_df.iloc[0]['coordinate']}")
    company_coordinate = company_df.iloc[0]['coordinate']
    company_name = company_df.iloc[0]['name']
else:
    print("UNRESOLVED: company_id 2426")
    company_coordinate = None
    company_name = None

# 2. 获取所有空气质量监测站点的坐标
query_stations = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate, district_id, city_id FROM air_quality_station
""")
stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print(f"监测站点总数: {len(stations_df)}")

# 3. 获取公司2426在2025-06-10 06:00-10:00的排放数据
query_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2426
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 06:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-10 10:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)
print(f"\n排放数据记录数: {len(emission_df)}")
if len(emission_df) > 0:
    print(emission_df[['timestamp', 'exhaust_gas', 'nox']].to_string())
    print(f"\n烟气总量: {emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum()}")
    print(f"烟气峰值: {emission_df['exhaust_gas'].max()}")
    print(f"NOx总量: {emission_df['nox'].sum()}")

# 4. 计算公司10公里内的监测站点数量
if company_coordinate is not None:
    query_nearby_stations = text("""
    SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, %(coord)s) as distance_m
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, %(coord)s, 10000)
    ORDER BY distance_m
    """)
    nearby_stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_nearby_stations, engine, params={'coord': company_coordinate})
    print(f"\n公司10公里内监测站点数: {len(nearby_stations_df)}")
    if len(nearby_stations_df) > 0:
        print(nearby_stations_df.to_string())
else:
    nearby_stations_df = pd.DataFrame()
    print("\n无法计算10公里内站点数（公司坐标未找到）")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 修复10公里内站点查询 - 使用字符串格式化替代参数化查询
company_coord_str = "0101000020E61000008CBE823463955D40680586AC6EC94340"

query_nearby_stations = text(f"""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, ST_GeomFromWKB(decode('{company_coord_str}', 'hex'))) as distance_m
FROM air_quality_station aqs
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, ST_GeomFromWKB(decode('{company_coord_str}', 'hex')), 10000)
ORDER BY distance_m
""")
nearby_stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_nearby_stations, engine)
print(f"公司10公里内监测站点数: {len(nearby_stations_df)}")
if len(nearby_stations_df) > 0:
    print(nearby_stations_df.to_string())

# 重新确认排放数据
query_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2426
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 06:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-10 10:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)
print(f"\n排放数据记录数: {len(emission_df)}")
print(emission_df.to_string())

# 计算统计值
total_flue_gas_val = emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum()
peak_flue_gas_val = emission_df['exhaust_gas'].max()
total_nox_val = emission_df['nox'].sum()
stations_within_10km_val = len(nearby_stations_df)

print(f"\n=== 统计结果 ===")
print(f"烟气总量: {total_flue_gas_val}")
print(f"烟气峰值: {peak_flue_gas_val}")
print(f"NOx总量: {total_nox_val}")
print(f"10公里内站点数: {stations_within_10km_val}")

# 存储到自有变量供合成代理使用
company_2426_total_flue_gas = total_flue_gas_val
company_2426_peak_flue_gas = peak_flue_gas_val
company_2426_total_nox = total_nox_val
company_2426_stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km_val

# 查看已有的排放数据和附近站点数据
print("=== 排放数据 ===")
print(emission_df.head(10))
print(f"\n排放数据形状: {emission_df.shape}")
print(f"排放数据列: {emission_df.columns.tolist()}")

print("\n=== 附近站点数据 ===")
print(nearby_stations_df.head(10))
print(f"\n附近站点数据形状: {nearby_stations_df.shape}")
print(f"附近站点数据列: {nearby_stations_df.columns.tolist()}")

print("\n=== 公司坐标 ===")
print(company_coordinate)

# 计算总烟气量（exhaust_gas总和）
total_flue_gas_val = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum())
print(f"总烟气量: {total_flue_gas_val}")

# 计算峰值烟气量（exhaust_gas最大值）
peak_flue_gas_val = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].max())
print(f"峰值烟气量: {peak_flue_gas_val}")

# 计算总NOx排放量
total_nox_val = float(emission_df['nox'].sum())
print(f"总NOx排放量: {total_nox_val}")

# 计算10公里内站点数量
stations_within_10km_val = int(len(nearby_stations_df))
print(f"10公里内站点数量: {stations_within_10km_val}")

# 存储结果到指定变量
total_flue_gas = total_flue_gas_val
peak_flue_gas = peak_flue_gas_val
total_nox = total_nox_val
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km_val

print("\n=== 最终结果 ===")
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")
print(f"stations_within_10km: {stations_within_10km}")

# Assign the required output variables using the intermediate values already computed by upstream agents
# Reusing company_2426_* variables that were staged by upstream agents

total_flue_gas = float(company_2426_total_flue_gas)
peak_flue_gas = float(company_2426_peak_flue_gas)
total_nox = float(company_2426_total_nox)
stations_within_10km = int(company_2426_stations_within_10km)

# Print the assigned values to confirm
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas} (type: {type(total_flue_gas).__name__})")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas} (type: {type(peak_flue_gas).__name__})")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox} (type: {type(total_nox).__name__})")
print(f"stations_within_10km: {stations_within_10km} (type: {type(stations_within_10km).__name__})")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取公司2426的位置信息
query_company = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate::text as coord_text
FROM polluting_company
WHERE id = 2426
""")
company_df = pd.read_sql(query_company, engine)
print("公司信息：")
print(company_df[['id', 'name', 'coord_text']])

# 2. 查询2025-06-10 06:00-10:00的排放数据（左闭右开）
query_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2426
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 06:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-10 10:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)
print("\n排放数据：")
print(emission_df)

# 3. 计算总烟气、峰值烟气、总NOx
if not emission_df.empty:
    total_flue_gas_val = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum())
    peak_flue_gas_val = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].max())
    total_nox_val = float(emission_df['nox'].sum())
    print(f"\n总烟气量: {total_flue_gas_val}")
    print(f"峰值烟气量: {peak_flue_gas_val}")
    print(f"总NOx: {total_nox_val}")
else:
    total_flue_gas_val = 0.0
    peak_flue_gas_val = 0.0
    total_nox_val = 0.0
    print("\n警告：未找到排放数据！")

# 4. 查询10公里范围内的空气质量站点
company_coord = company_df['coord_text'].iloc[0]
query_nearby = text(f"""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('{company_coord}', 4326)) as distance_m
FROM air_quality_station aqs
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('{company_coord}', 4326), 10000)
ORDER BY distance_m
""")
nearby_stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_nearby, engine)
print(f"\n10公里内空气质量站点数量: {len(nearby_stations_df)}")
print(nearby_stations_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取公司2426的经纬度坐标
query_company_coords = text("""
SELECT ST_X(coordinate) as lon, ST_Y(coordinate) as lat
FROM polluting_company
WHERE id = 2426
""")
company_coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_company_coords, engine)
print("公司坐标：")
print(company_coords_df)

lon = company_coords_df['lon'].iloc[0]
lat = company_coords_df['lat'].iloc[0]

# 2. 查询10公里范围内的空气质量站点
query_nearby = text(f"""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint({lon}, {lat}), 4326)) as distance_m
FROM air_quality_station aqs
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint({lon}, {lat}), 4326), 10000)
ORDER BY distance_m
""")
nearby_stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_nearby, engine)
print(f"\n10公里内空气质量站点数量: {len(nearby_stations_df)}")
print(nearby_stations_df)

# 3. 重新计算排放指标以验证
query_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2426
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 06:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-10 10:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)

total_flue_gas_val = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum())
peak_flue_gas_val = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].max())
total_nox_val = float(emission_df['nox'].sum())

print(f"\n验证排放数据：")
print(f"总烟气量: {total_flue_gas_val}")
print(f"峰值烟气量: {peak_flue_gas_val}")
print(f"总NOx: {total_nox_val}")

# 4. 存储最终结果
total_flue_gas = total_flue_gas_val
peak_flue_gas = peak_flue_gas_val
total_nox = total_nox_val
stations_within_10km = len(nearby_stations_df)

print(f"\n最终结果：")
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")
print(f"stations_within_10km: {stations_within_10km}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 获取公司2426的经纬度坐标
query_company_coords = text("""
SELECT ST_X(coordinate::geometry) as lon, ST_Y(coordinate::geometry) as lat
FROM polluting_company
WHERE id = 2426
""")
company_coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_company_coords, engine)
print("公司坐标：")
print(company_coords_df)

lon = company_coords_df['lon'].iloc[0]
lat = company_coords_df['lat'].iloc[0]

# 2. 查询10公里范围内的空气质量站点

SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint({lon}, {lat}), 4326)) as distance_m
FROM air_quality_station aqs
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint({lon}, {lat}), 4326), 10000)
ORDER BY distance_m
""")
nearby_stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_nearby, engine)
print(f"\n10公里内空气质量站点数量: {len(nearby_stations_df)}")
print(nearby_stations_df)

# 3. 重新计算排放指标以验证

SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2426
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 06:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-10 10:00:00'

""")

peak_flue_gas_val = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].max())
total_nox_val = float(emission_df['nox'].sum())

print(f"\n验证排放数据：")

print(f"峰值烟气量: {peak_flue_gas_val}")

peak_flue_gas = peak_flue_gas_val
total_nox = total_nox_val

print(f"\n最终结果：")

print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")

print(f"stations_within_10km: {stations_within_10km}")

# 5. 打印验证字符串

print(f"VERIFY peak_flue_gas: stored=30326000.0 | independent={peak_flue_gas_val} | final={peak_flue_gas_val}")

print(f"VERIFY stations_within_10km: stored=0 | independent={stations_within_10km} | final={stations_within_10km}")
